understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile (+) by maneuvering the character through the grid, using moves, clickable block removal, and undo to navigate around spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves horizontally with MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT. After each horizontal move, gravity (DOWN in this episode) pulls the character until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike (end of run), or reaching the goal. Some tiles are clickable ('x') and can be removed to create new fall paths. UNDO reverts the last action. The level has a limited number of turns per attempt and a limited number of attempts. The corridor scan showed landing positions for each column, and passages indicated columns that would drop the player to a different y-level.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile (+) by maneuvering the character through the grid, using moves, clickable block removal, and undo to navigate around spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves horizontally with MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT. After each horizontal move, gravity (DOWN in this episode) pulls the character until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike (end of run), or reaching the goal. Some tiles are clickable ('x') and can be removed to create new fall paths. UNDO reverts the last action. The level has a limited number of turns per attempt and a limited number of attempts. The corridor scan showed landing positions for each column, and passages indicated columns that would drop the player to a different y-level.
